economic_notes: Band owns Lheit Lit'en Development Corporation (100%), Tano T'enneh General Partner Corporation (100%), Tano T'enneh Limited Partnership (99.99%), and FN (PTP) Group Limited Partnership (0.06%). Tano T'enneh LP reported revenue of $5,483,734 and net income of $4,051,801. Band has a $400,000 demand facility and $5,000,000 revolving facility, neither utilized at year end. CMHC housing replacement reserve of $400,363.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to unaudited financial information for government business enterprises (Lheit Lit'en Development Corporation and FN (PTP) Group Limited Partnership) for years ended March 31, 2021 and 2020. Four GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. One fully consolidated subsidiary (CMHC Social Housing Program). OSR calculated as total revenue ($17,024,337) minus total government transfers ($8,059,704) = $8,964,633, which includes GBE income ($4,349,191), band generated revenue ($2,554,874), FNHA ($1,716,164), other indigenous organizations ($305,035), interest ($294,687), admin fees ($30,365), donations ($14,110), less transfer to deferred revenue (-$299,793). No schedule of remuneration included in the document. Recovery of $20,854 shown separately on income statement.
